notes: I put in the game cd key and everything freezes up after that.  Cant get past the activation screen.    I didnt find a way around that.
title: Dead Space™ 2

notes: With my setup and this version of Proton, I did not have to do anything for the game to run. Validation of the key was done, it took a while to load the main window (1 or 2 minutes, I thought it had hung, and was actually going to bring up taskmgr to check) but just as I was typing the commands the window opened.
title: Dead Space™ 2

notes:
The game runs fine but the audio was glitching, for some reason. I disabled Esync, and added to launch options "-vulkan", without quotes. After that, game is running like it should. 
Also, im not sure if thats a problem from Proton, but i cant connect my game to EA server. Dont know why.
title: Dead Space™ 2

notes: Game runs perfectly. The only problem I have is that the Xbox controller does not work out of the box.
title: Dead Space™ 2

notes: key validation worked without problems. the game runs perfectly out of the box but it takes more than a minute to open the game
title: Dead Space™ 2
